candidate.name: Promote upright traction and command locomotion
candidate.hypothesis: A four-beat crawl on observable normal-progress surfaces can keep sagittal pitch bounded, while a measured early-progress classifier retains the proven bound under slip and a command-speed boundary retains the locked delayed transition gait without reading Scenario identity.
candidate.expectedEffect: Eliminate every hard upright-locomotion violation, preserve authored progress and tracking gates, and retain zero violations on extreme traction, spatial generalization, command tracking, and command transitions.
